Period_Start: The start date of the period during which the impact of Conversational AI was measured.
Period_End: The end date of the period during which the impact of Conversational AI was measured.
Channel: The communication channel on which Conversational AI was used.
Initial_Avg_Response_Time: The average response time (in minutes) before the implementation of Conversational AI.
Final_Avg_Response_Time: The average response time (in minutes) after the implementation of Conversational AI.
Response_Time_Reduction: The percentage reduction in average response time due to the implementation of Conversational AI.
